extendedQueries.sql: SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks ORDER BY tasks.status ASC, tasks.priority DESC, tasks."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $1

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" order by "tasks"."status" asc, "tasks"."priority" desc, "tasks"."createdAt" desc limit $1

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT organizations.id, organizations.name, organizations.plan, COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('id', projects_0.id, 'name', projects_0.name, 'tasks', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('id', tasks_1.id, 'title', tasks_1.title, 'priority', tasks_1.priority, 'assignee', CASE WHEN assignee_joined_2.id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object('email', assignee_joined_2.email) ELSE NULL END, 'labels', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('label', CASE WHEN label_joined_4.id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object('name', label_joined_4.name, 'color', label_joined_4.color) ELSE NULL END) AS row FROM "public"."task_labels" labels_3 LEFT JOIN "public"."labels" label_joined_4 ON label_joined_4.id = labels_3."labelId" WHERE labels_3."taskId" = tasks_1.id LIMIT $11) AS labels_row_5), '[]'::json), 'comments', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('content', comments_6.content, 'author', CASE WHEN author_joined_7.id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object('name', author_joined_7.name) ELSE NULL END, 'replies', COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('content', replies_8.content) AS row FROM "public"."comments" replies_8 WHERE replies_8."parentId" = comments_6.id ORDER BY replies_8.id ASC LIMIT $12) AS replies_row_9), '[]'::json)) AS row FROM "public"."comments" comments_6 LEFT JOIN "public"."users" author_joined_7 ON author_joined_7.id = comments_6."authorId" WHERE comments_6."taskId" = tasks_1.id AND comments_6."isEdited" = $13 ORDER BY comments_6.id ASC LIMIT $14) AS comments_row_10), '[]'::json), '_count', json_build_object('comments', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_comments_1.__cnt, 0), 'attachments', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_attachments_3.__cnt, 0))) AS row FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_1 LEFT JOIN "public"."users" assignee_joined_2 ON assignee_joined_2.id = tasks_1."assigneeId" LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_comments_0."taskId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."comments" __tp_cnt_comments_0 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_comments_0."taskId") __tp_cnt_j_comments_1 ON __tp_cnt_j_comments_1."__fk0" = tasks_1.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_attachments_2."taskId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."attachments" __tp_cnt_attachments_2 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_attachments_2."taskId") __tp_cnt_j_attachments_3 ON __tp_cnt_j_attachments_3."__fk0" = tasks_1.id WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id AND tasks_1.status <> $15 ORDER BY tasks_1.priority DESC, tasks_1.id ASC LIMIT $16) AS tasks_row_11), '[]'::json), '_count', json_build_object('tasks', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_tasks_1.__cnt, 0), 'labels', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_labels_3.__cnt, 0), 'milestones', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_milestones_5.__cnt, 0))) AS row FROM "public"."projects" projects_0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_tasks_0."projectId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."tasks" __tp_cnt_tasks_0 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_tasks_0."projectId") __tp_cnt_j_tasks_1 ON __tp_cnt_j_tasks_1."__fk0" = projects_0.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_labels_2."projectId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."labels" __tp_cnt_labels_2 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_labels_2."projectId") __tp_cnt_j_labels_3 ON __tp_cnt_j_labels_3."__fk0" = projects_0.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_milestones_4."projectId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."milestones" __tp_cnt_milestones_4 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_milestones_4."projectId") __tp_cnt_j_milestones_5 ON __tp_cnt_j_milestones_5."__fk0" = projects_0.id WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id AND projects_0.status = $17 ORDER BY projects_0."createdAt" DESC, projects_0.id ASC LIMIT $18) AS projects_row_12), '[]'::json) AS projects, COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT json_build_object('role', members_13.role, 'user', CASE WHEN user_joined_14.id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object('email', user_joined_14.email) ELSE NULL END) AS row FROM "public"."members" members_13 LEFT JOIN "public"."users" user_joined_14 ON user_joined_14.id = members_13."userId" WHERE members_13."organizationId" = organizations.id AND members_13.role = ANY($19) ORDER BY members_13.id ASC LIMIT $20) AS members_row_15), '[]'::json) AS members, json_build_object('projects', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_projects_1.__cnt, 0), 'members', COALESCE(__tp_cnt_j_members_3.__cnt, 0)) AS _count FROM "public"."organizations" organizations LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_projects_0."organizationId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."projects" __tp_cnt_projects_0 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_projects_0."organizationId") __tp_cnt_j_projects_1 ON __tp_cnt_j_projects_1."__fk0" = organizations.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT __tp_cnt_members_2."organizationId" AS "__fk0", COUNT(*)::int AS __cnt FROM "public"."members" __tp_cnt_members_2 GROUP BY __tp_cnt_members_2."organizationId") __tp_cnt_j_members_3 ON __tp_cnt_j_members_3."__fk0" = organizations.id WHERE organizations.plan = ANY($1) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."projects" projects_0 WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id AND projects_0.status = ANY($2) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_1 WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id AND (tasks_1.priority = $3) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."comments" comments_2 WHERE comments_2."taskId" = tasks_1.id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."comments" replies_3 WHERE replies_3."parentId" = comments_2.id AND 1=1))) AND (tasks_1."createdAt" >= $4)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."tasks" tasks_1 WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id AND NOT (tasks_1.status <> $5)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."labels" labels_4 WHERE labels_4."projectId" = projects_0.id AND labels_4.name LIKE $6)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."projects" projects_0 WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id AND NOT (projects_0."isPublic" = $7)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."members" members_5 WHERE members_5."organizationId" = organizations.id AND members_5.role = ANY($8) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."users" user_6 WHERE user_6.id = members_5."userId" AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."tasks" assignedtasks_7 WHERE assignedtasks_7."assigneeId" = user_6.id AND assignedtasks_7.priority = $9 AND assignedtasks_7."completedAt" IS NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."tasks" assignedtasks_7 WHERE assignedtasks_7."assigneeId" = user_6.id AND assignedtasks_7.status = $10))) ORDER BY organizations."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $21
